texto: The gap (between intellectuals and politicians) divides writing hands, talking heads and thinking minds of this country into two sections. One section flaunts academic achievements to make up for shortfalls in intelligence. The other asserts intelligence to camouflage deficiencies in academic excellence. In short, our intellectuals are torn by the dilemma whether they ought to carry their brains in their mouths, or mouths in their brains.
explicacao: Citação de Mohammad Badrul Ahsan sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “The gap (between intellectuals and politicians) divides writing hands, talking heads and thinking…” articula inteligencia, influence, intellectualism em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e intellectualism.

frase_original: The gap (between intellectuals and politicians) divides writing hands, talking heads and thinking minds of this country into two sections. One section flaunts academic achievements to make up for shortfalls in intelligence. The other asserts intelligence to camouflage deficiencies in academic excellence. In short, our intellectuals are torn by the dilemma whether they ought to carry their brains in their mouths, or mouths in their brains.
